canonical_definition: A benchmark dataset of nearly 48,000 grade-labeled question-answer pairs across nine science subjects for Grades 1–12, designed to evaluate grade-level adaptability in LLMs through both multiple-choice and open-ended questions.
papers: CodeSSM: Towards State Space Models for Code Understanding

relationships.paper: CodeSSM: Towards State Space Models for Code Understanding
relationships.evidence: To the best of our knowledge, EDUADAPT is the ﬁrst benchmark designed speciﬁcally for evaluating grade-level adaptability of LLMs across the full K-12 system. (Section 1)
